# SOLA-Stafette — Strecken (source: asvz.ch/event/643-strecken)
# Fetched: 2026-04-29
# URL: https://asvz.ch/event/643-strecken
# IMMUTABLE SOURCE — do not edit

## Overview
- Total: 113km, 2600hm
- 14 legs, starting at Bucheggplatz, finishing at Irchel (Sport Center)
- SOLA-Map & GPX: https://trackmaxx.ch/maps/?m=ec368d93-aff4-4a7e-b0a5-24b7f9683a32&view=teilnehmende

## Route marking
- Official markings: yellow jalons with ASVZ logo, sawdust, marking tape, small fanions
- **Strecken 3 and 6 are marked with RED jalons** (due to crossing issues)
- Ascending km signs mark distance covered on each leg
- Leaving the marked route is not permitted

---

## Strecke 1 — 3.63km / 65hm / Start: Bucheggplatz
- Start: Grillstelle Käferberg, 8037 Zürich (47.399583, 8.529667)
- Timing: 07:30 Gruppe L (slow, bib 1–615); 08:00 Gruppe S (fast, bib 616–1111)
- Character: Easy — short leg, little elevation, exclusively natural forest roads
- Suitable for wheelchair users
- No changing rooms or showers at start
- Clothing transport: Bucheggplatz → Hönggerberg 07:00–08:05

---

## Strecke 2 — 13.67km / 160hm / Übergabe: Hönggerberg
- Start: Robert-Gnehm-Platz 1, 8093 Zürich (47.40695, 8.51074)
- Timing: 07:40–08:35 expected
- Character: Demanding — long leg, lots of ascent and descent; mix of natural roads, city passages on tarmac, forest and open terrain
- **Zeitneutralisation on Zürcherstrasse**: timer pauses on entry of marked zone, resumes on exit (traffic safety measure)
- No access from outside; no spectators allowed at handover
- Strict no-parking on ETH grounds; parking only in ETH underground garage HIL
- Clothing transport: Hönggerberg → Buchlern 07:00–08:20
- Changing rooms/showers: Sport Center Hönggerberg
- Catering: SV Boxenstop stand (paid), 07:30–14:30, in front of Sport Center

---

## Strecke 3 — 5.88km / 413hm / Übergabe: Buchlern
- Start: Friedhofstrasse 89, 8048 Zürich (47.38083, 8.47716)
- Timing: 08:35–10:00 expected
- Character: Demanding — short leg with lots of ascent; almost exclusively natural roads mostly in forest; some narrow passages with steep stairs
- **RED jalons** (yellow jalons visible belong to Strecke 5 — ignore)
- No clothing transport Buchlern → Uetliberg (suggestion: Läufer:in 4 takes bag from Läufer:in 3)
- Changing rooms/showers: Sportanlage Buchlern
- Medical: in changing room building, Sanitätszimmer
- Catering: restaurant in changing room building (open Sat from 07:30)

---

## Strecke 4 — 5.88km / 122hm / Übergabe: Uetliberg
- Start: Gratstrasse 1, 8143 Uetliberg (47.35144, 8.49045)
- Timing: 09:10–10:50 expected
- Character: Easy — flat leg, stunning views; exclusively natural roads; alternating forest and open terrain
- No clothing transport Uetliberg → Felsenegg
- No changing rooms or showers
- Absolute no-driving zone in Uetliberg area (Waldegg-Ringlikon onwards)

---

## Strecke 5 — 13.92km / 288hm / Übergabe: Felsenegg
- Start: Felsenegg 1, 8143 Stallikon (47.30842, 8.50839)
- Timing: 09:40–11:50 expected
- Character: Very demanding — long leg, lots of ascent and descent in narrow passages; mix of natural roads, tarmac, forest and open terrain
- **Yellow jalons** (red jalons visible belong to Strecke 3 — ignore)
- Access: Shuttle bus from Bahnhof Adliswil (Bus Kante B) every 20min 08:00–12:00 (~30min incl. walk). No private car access.
- Small mass start at ~10:40 for unrelayed runners
- No changing rooms or showers on Felsenegg
- Catering: Bergrestaurant Felsenegg (open from 08:30)

---

## Strecke 6 — 10.4km / 234hm / Übergabe: Buchlern
- Start: Friedhofstrasse 89, 8048 Zürich (47.38083, 8.47716) — same address as Strecke 3
- Timing: **10:30–12:55 expected**
- Character: **Demanding — long leg with lots of ascent and descent; mix of natural roads and city passages on tarmac; almost exclusively in open terrain**
- **RED jalons** (yellow jalons visible belong to Strecke 2 — ignore)
- **Zeitneutralisation on Zürcherstrasse**: timer pauses on entry of marked zone, resumes on exit (traffic safety measure). Zone visible in red on SOLA-Map.
- Strict no-parking on ETH grounds; parking only in ETH underground garage HIL
- Waiting runners in 100er-Sektoren (smaller groups than other legs)
- Clothing transport: Buchlern → Hönggerberg 10:10–12:00
- Changing rooms/showers: Sportanlage Buchlern
- Medical: in changing room building, Sanitätszimmer
- Catering: restaurant in changing room building (open Sat from 07:30)
- GPX/Map: https://trackmaxx.ch/maps/?m=ec368d93-aff4-4a7e-b0a5-24b7f9683a32&view=strecke6

---

## Strecke 7 — 4.51km / 54hm / Übergabe: Hönggerberg
- Start: Robert-Gnehm-Platz 1, 8093 Zürich (47.40695, 8.51074)
- Timing: 11:10–14:00 expected
- Character: Easy — short and flat; mostly natural roads in forest
- No access from outside; no spectators at handover
- Strict no-parking on ETH grounds; parking only HIL underground
- Clothing transport: Hönggerberg → Irchel 11:20–12:50

---

## Zwischenziel Irchel (Intermediate)
- Address: Winterthurerstrasse 190, 8057 Zürich (47.39797, 8.54613)
- Timing: 11:25–14:30 expected
- Clothing transport from Hönggerberg → Irchel
- Changing rooms/showers: Sport Center Irchel
- SOLA-Dörfli: diverse activities and food stands

---

## Strecke 8 — 6.21km / 212hm / Neustart: Irchel
- Same address as Zwischenziel Irchel
- Restart: 12:30 Gruppe L; 13:00 Gruppe S
- Character: Medium — short leg with lots of ascent at start; mostly natural roads in forest
- Clothing transport: Irchel → Fluntern (12:30 Gruppe L, 13:00 Gruppe S)

---

## Strecke 9 — 11.13km / 267hm / Übergabe: Fluntern
- Start: Zürichbergstrasse 196, 8044 Zürich (47.38351, 8.57355)
- Timing: 12:50–13:50 expected
- Character: Demanding — long leg with many short climbs; mostly natural roads in forest
- Changing rooms/showers: Sport Center Fluntern

---

## Strecke 10 — 8.62km / 159hm / Übergabe: Forch
- Start: Kaltensteinstrasse 34, 8127 Forch (47.32573, 8.64843)
- Timing: 13:40–15:15 expected
- Character: Medium — medium length, ascent at start and lots of descent at end; mostly natural roads, mix of forest and open terrain
- Changing rooms: Schulhaus Aesch (~15min walk from handover)

---

## Strecke 11 — 12.64km / 421hm / Übergabe: Egg
- Start: Im Oberdorf 14a, 8132 Egg (47.30153, 8.68688)
- Timing: 14:20–16:10 expected
- Character: Very demanding — long leg with lots of ascent at start; mostly natural roads in forest; long narrow passage in Küsnachtertobel
- Small mass start at ~15:30

---

## Strecke 12 — 6.29km / 78hm / Übergabe: Zumikon
- Start: Dorfstrasse 45, 8126 Zumikon (47.33349, 8.62356)
- Timing: 15:10–17:15 expected
- Character: Easy — short leg with little ascent; mix of natural roads and tarmac, open terrain and forest
- Suitable for wheelchair users

---

## Zwischenziel Witikon (Intermediate)
- Address: Katzenschwanzstrasse 47, 8053 Zürich (47.36507, 8.60225)
- Timing: 15:35–17:55 expected

---

## Strecke 13 — 4.62km / 80hm / Jagdstart: Witikon
- Same address as Zwischenziel Witikon
- Jagdstart 16:30; Neustart S 16:35; Neustart L 16:45
- Character: Easy — short leg with ascent at start; mostly natural roads in forest
- Hunt start: best-placed team starts first, others follow with their time gap

---

## Strecke 14 — 5.59km / 65hm / Übergabe: Fluntern
- Start: Zürichbergstrasse 196, 8044 Zürich (47.38351, 8.57355)
- Timing: 16:40–17:35 expected
- Character: Easy — short leg with short sharp climb and descent at end; almost exclusively natural roads in forest

---

## Ziel Irchel (Finish)
- Address: Winterthurerstrasse 190, 8057 Zürich (47.39797, 8.54613)
- Timing: 17:00–18:15 expected
- Awards ceremony after last runner arrives (~18:15)
- Spaghettata in Mensa UNI Irchel from 18:00
- Changing rooms/showers: Sport Center Irchel (open until 19:30)
